title: Parallel between EoTV and EoE
wikitext:
[]: Parallel between EoTV and EoE             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Feb 23, 2012 2:46 am Did you ever notice, that Asuka blames Shinji for being a pervert in both endings? In EoTV he has an erection and in EoE he jerks off... Ah... ehm... nevermind.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Feb 23, 2012 3:40 pm It's because it's a strong possibility that EOE and the TV Ending are two tellings of the same exact events.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Feb 23, 2012 4:24 pm or maybe it's just because Asuka ALWAYS assumes Shinji is doing something perverted.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Feb 23, 2012 9:03 pm There is a parallel, but his need for "real" love is never explicit in EoTV... well, the "erection" that he gets doesn't mean that he's really into Asuka... since it's the alternative reality of the show. EoE is different, as it's the actual reality that was shown throughout the show, so the actual actions occurring do affect his state of the need of "real" love. So, I'd say, in this context... opposite.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 24, 2012 2:52 am Quite. Shinji's need is clearly to be able to believe himself worth consideration -- he has to learn to walk before he can run. And in the AU sequence, well, morning wood is just one of those things that happens to guys, without needing any particular external trigger; still, being one of them Chinese cartoons, whatever the MC does that a girl can misinterpret, he's a pervert, at fault, and cruisin' for a bruisin'.

[]:             Quote Post by Reptile » Sat Feb 25, 2012 11:56 pm Because every girl in every anime always assumes every guy in every anime is a pervert, in any situation, just being born with a penis makes you a pervert. And also because Asuka is always such a tease.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Mar 12, 2012 3:25 pm NemZ wrote: or maybe it's just because Asuka ALWAYS assumes Shinji is doing something perverted.
